data_contracts_note: Slack message format is specified with example template. Webhook endpoint expected but no request/response schema details.

present: Primary goal: notify team when 3 critical workflows fail
Notification channel explicitly named: #team-ai-sdk
Two specific changes: new workflow file + renaming existing secret
Message format template provided
absent: What constitutes a 'failure'? (any non-zero exit, specific job failure, workflow cancellation?)
Should all job failures trigger notification or only certain ones?
Frequency/deduplication: notify on every failure or batch/throttle?

present: Implicit: mentions 'fail unexpectedly' but doesn't define unexpected
absent: What if Slack webhook is down/invalid? Retry policy?
What if workflow monitoring itself breaks?
Invalid webhook URL handling?
Rate limiting on Slack side — any throttling needed?
Partial failures (e.g., 2 of 3 workflows fail) — different behavior?
Network timeouts, transient failures

present: Explicitly names 3 workflows in scope: Auto-merge Release PRs, Backport, Release
Clear file paths: `.github/workflows/slack-workflow-failure-notification.yml` and `.github/workflows/slack-team-review-notification.yml`
Rename scope is clear: only `SLACK_SEND_MESSAGE_URL` → `SLACK_PR_REVIEW_REQUEST_URL`
Related issue link provided
absent: Are there other workflows not being monitored? Why those 3?
Should this eventually scale to other workflows?
Backwards compatibility: what about existing consumers of old secret name?

present: Manual verification mentioned (curl test of Slack webhook)
Pre-merge task checklist with secret creation
Tasks are tracked and marked complete
absent: No Given/When/Then scenarios
No specific test cases listed (e.g., 'when Release workflow fails with X status, expect notification in Y seconds')
How to verify notification arrived in Slack? Screenshot? Timestamp?
Success criteria: does every test need to pass before merge?
Performance/latency expectations: how quickly should notification arrive?

present: Slack message template provided with 2 fields: status emoji + workflow name + URL
Webhook endpoints referenced by secret name (implies specific contract)
Two distinct URLs mentioned: `SLACK_PR_REVIEW_REQUEST_URL` and `SLACK_WORKFLOW_FAILURE_URL`
absent: Webhook request format: method (POST assumed?), headers, body structure
Response format/codes expected from Slack
Are there optional fields in the notification (e.g., run ID, branch, author)?
Character limits, escaping requirements for workflow name?
What if URL contains special characters?

present: Specific file paths referenced: `.github/workflows/` files
Related to issue #12223
Three named workflows: Auto-merge Release PRs, Backport, Release
GitHub Actions context implied (workflow_run events)
absent: No mention of which GitHub Actions events trigger monitoring (workflow_run? on failure?)
No reference to existing workflow configs or how they integrate
Does this depend on any external GitHub Actions (from marketplace)?
Any changes to workflow trigger conditions?

present: Specific message format with emoji (❌)
Three specific workflows named by title
Secret names explicit and versioned (old vs new)
Manual curl test verification mentioned
absent: Timing: when does the notification fire? Immediately on failure or after retry?
Retry logic: if notification fails, how many times?
Slack rate limits: if multiple workflows fail simultaneously, what happens?
URL construction: is workflow run URL auto-generated or manual?
Mention @channel or specific user handles in notification?
